Meta.title: DOMTEKNIKA - Product engineering and prototyping
Meta.description: DOMTEKNIKA bridges engineering, prototyping and production for industrial companies and innovators from Switzerland.

Hero.lead: From the first spark of an idea to serial production, DOMTEKNIKA bridges engineering and manufacturing for industrials and innovators. Mechanical engineering, tailored industrial solutions and precision prototyping made in Switzerland.

Meta.title: DOMTEKNIKA - Projects
Meta.description: Explore selected DOMTEKNIKA projects in Swiss precision engineering, prototyping and production.

Meta.title: DOMTEKNIKA - Patents
Meta.description: Explore DOMTEKNIKA's protected innovations, patents and engineering portfolio across core industries.

Meta.title: DOMTEKNIKA - Get in touch
Meta.description: Contact DOMTEKNIKA in La Neuveville, Switzerland to discuss engineering, prototyping and production projects.

Hero.title: Get in touch
Hero.lead: Have a question, a project in mind, or just want to explore how we can work together? We're here to help.

location.title: Our location
location.body:
Chemin de Saint-Joux 16B
2520 La Neuveville
Switzerland

Form.title: Send us a message
Form.secure: Your information is secure and will never be shared.
Form.success: Message ready. We'll connect this form to your inbox next.

Map.title: Visit our workshop
Map.body: Our office and workshop are located in La Neuveville, between Lake Biel and the Jura foothills.

Process.ideaIntro: Every great product starts with an idea, a sketch, a problem to solve, or a system to improve.
Process.ideaBody: Whether you're an industrial company or a first-time innovator, we help you shape your dreams into something real.
Process.processBody: From feasibility study and CAD design to prototyping and serial production, we keep the full process agile and confidential.
Process.productBody: A production-ready part that works. Industrial clients reduce time-to-market. Innovators see their first idea become a manufacturable, testable product.

Meta.title: DOMTEKNIKA - Industrial expertise
Meta.description: Explore DOMTEKNIKA expertise: innovation, product design, prototyping, simulation, polymers and electronics integration from Switzerland.

Services.title: End-to-end expertise at every step
Services.intro: From one-of-a-kind prototypes to industrial-scale production, we help both individuals and companies design, engineer, and manufacture their ideas.

creativity.title: Creativity & Innovation
creativity.description: We turn raw concepts into new opportunities with strategic ideation and first-principle solutions.

design.title: Product Design
design.description: Industrial design, mechanical, electrical and systems engineering built for performance and manufacturability.

prototyping.title: Prototyping
prototyping.description: Fast prototyping and advanced techniques to validate ideas and reduce risk.

simulation.title: Simulation & Analysis
simulation.description: Advanced simulation and analysis to predict performance, optimize designs and ensure reliability.

polymer.title: Polymer & Injection Expertise
polymer.description: Expertise in polymer materials, injection molding and process optimization for precision components.

electronics.title: Electronics Integration
electronics.description: Smart electronics design and integration for connected, reliable and intelligent products.

Swiss.title: From Swiss roots. We shape your ideas.

partner.title: End-to-End Partner
partner.description: From concept to industrialization, we handle it all.

agile.title: Agile & Responsive
agile.description: We move fast, adapt quickly and stay close to you.

confidential.title: Confidential
confidential.description: Your ideas are safe with us. Always.

quality.title: Swiss Quality
quality.description: Precision engineering and premium quality by Swiss standards.

Cta.title: Have a challenge we can solve
Cta.subtitle: We partner with forward-thinking companies to turn complex challenges into smart, manufacturable solutions.

Cta.title: Let's shape your next idea
Cta.subtitle: Tell us your challenge. We'll design it, prototype it, and prepare it for the real world, all from our workshop in Switzerland.
